category_sources: source_facts.description says Yazi is a terminal file manager; official GitHub README describes Yazi as a terminal file manager written in Rust.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses 'Yazi'; source_facts.name is yazi.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README has a Documentation section linking yazi-rs.github.io docs for usage, features, and image preview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README/topics identify terminal file management, Rust, async I/O, TUI, cross-platform, and CLI usage.
